plugin_enabled.description: Enable Markdown-to-HTML conversion for eligible custom T2I templates.
plugin_enabled.hint: Turn the plugin on or off without uninstalling it.

skip_existing_html.description: Skip conversion when the plain text already looks like HTML.
skip_existing_html.hint: Recommended for templates or messages that may already contain rendered HTML.

excluded_templates.description: T2I template names that must never be pre-rendered by this plugin.
excluded_templates.hint: Official built-in Markdown templates should stay here.

markdown_extensions.hint: These names are passed directly to markdown.markdown(..., extensions=[...]).

allowed_protocols.description: Allowed URL protocols during bleach sanitization.
allowed_protocols.hint: Restricts href/src protocols that survive sanitization.

allowed_attributes_json.hint: JSON object mapping tag names to attribute lists, for example {"a": ["href", "title"]}.

html_tag_pattern.description: Regex used to detect whether plain text already contains HTML tags.
